# Iris Oracle Visual Direction and App Map

## Overview
This document consolidates the recommended visual direction, cinematic storyboard, app flow, and design principles for the **Iris Oracle** application. The goal is to craft a premium, mystical yet uplifting experience that blends dark cosmic backdrops with aurora hues, nature inspiration, and crystal optics.
